headline: Zealand Pharma Appoints Eric Rojas as Vice President and Head of Investor Relations
summary: Eric Rojas VP, Head of Investor Relations Press release – No. 7 / 2026 Zealand Pharma Appoints Eric Rojas as Vice President and Head of Investor Relations Bringing significant experience from Vertex Pharmaceuticals and Shire Copenhagen, Denmark and Boston, Massachusetts, April 14, 2026 - Zealand Pharma A/S (Nasdaq: ZEAL) (CVR-no. 20045078), a biotechnology company transforming the future of metabolic health, today announced the appointment of Eric Rojas, Vice President, Investor Relations, effec
